response.justification: Bogdan has a broad engineering background and solid tenure at reputable companies (Stripe, Shopify), but the resume shows no meaningful overlap with the core requirements of this role. There is no evidence of experimentation platform design, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging systems, or statistical/bias analysis — all of which are central to this Principal-level position. Telemetry and metrics infrastructure ownership is also absent. While his microservices work at Sociomantic touched high-throughput systems, it does not translate into the growth and measurement platform expertise the role demands. His current Staff-level scope also falls short of the Principal IC6 expectations around multi-workstream ownership and cross-org technical strategy.
strengths: Demonstrated experience with high-throughput distributed systems (millions of HTTP requests/second at Sociomantic, scale at Shopify and Stripe)
Strong full-stack and polyglot background with JavaScript/TypeScript as a primary strength, plus C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
Recent AI tooling and agentic infrastructure work at Stripe (MCP, agentic workflows) aligns directionally with the AI-first engineering mandate
concerns: Zero evidence of experimentation platform design, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management — the explicit core of this role
No telemetry, metrics pipeline, or measurement platform experience; data aptitude is not demonstrated anywhere in the resume
No cross-team foundational systems ownership or Principal-level scope; work history reflects individual contributor product delivery rather than platform-building that unblocks multiple teams

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or metrics infrastructure ownership
